articles.title: After weeks of speculation, Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in New York - NPR
articles.description: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bash is expected to last into Saturday morning.
articles.content:
NEW YORK -- Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are officially married.
After three years of dating, The pop icon and Super Bowl-winning football player, both 36, tied the knot in New York, according to a… [+8368 chars]

articles.title: Behind the ‘Supergirl’ Bomb: Competing Cuts, Creative Differences (Exclusive) - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: For months, DC Studios knew the film wasn't working. Things came to a head in March when the studio tested its own cut against one from filmmaker Craig Gillespie.

articles.title: Dolly Parton asks Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their firstborn child in thank-you video: 'One special baby' - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: Dolly Parton asked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce if she could have their firstborn child in a thank-you video for their $2 million donation to her Imagination Library charity ahead of their wedding.
articles.content:
